title: Figure 10 in Increasing awareness for soil biodiversity and protection
author: Xylander, Willi E. R.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 10. Children´s level, here with an integrated hands-on element. The comic shows the way of a soil sample to the museum for extraction of soil animals and investigation procedure. Photo: Sven Tränkler, Senckenberg.
